heroBio: **Senior Manager II, Software Engineer** at **Circana** with **17+ years** building and leading **mobile and hybrid applications**. I lead engineering teams to deliver **consumer intelligence and analytics** for global brands—leveraging **Cursor for app infrastructure development** and architecture, **cloud platforms** for scale, an **in-house AI agent** for **data analytics and deep learning–driven reports**, and a **shared notification infrastructure** (FCM and internal server) used by multiple in-house apps. Passionate about **clean code**, **engineering discipline**, and **shipping on time**.
bio:
I'm a **Senior Manager II, Software Engineer** at **Circana**, where I lead and hands-on deliver **mobile and cross-platform solutions** that power **consumer intelligence and analytics** for global CPG, retail, and brand clients.

**What I do:** I own the **full lifecycle**—from project initiation and planning through development, testing, and delivery. I **use Cursor to drive app infrastructure development**, testing flows, and architecture, and work with **cloud platforms** for scalable backends. I've built an **in-house AI agent** that handles **app data analytics with deep learning** and **manages reports**, and developed **notification infrastructure**—**Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)** and an **internal server**—as an **independent service** used by **multiple in-house apps** for notification needs. I drive **end-to-end delivery** of mobile applications using **native and cross-platform mobile** (React Native, Flutter, Kotlin, Swift), APIs, and **industry-standard tools**: **Git**, **Scrum and Jira**, **build automation and CI/CD**, and **Play Store / App Store** release. I focus on **efficient team handling**, **clear processes**, and getting **quality software** into users' hands on time.

**Why it matters:** At Circana, our work helps brands and retailers understand and act on **consumer behavior**. My focus is making that intelligence **accessible**, **reliable**, and **performant**—whether on phones, tablets, or internal dashboards. I care about **clean architecture**, **team growth**, and **shipping on time** without cutting corners on quality.

**Beyond the day job:** I stay current with **mobile and platform trends** and enjoy turning **complex requirements** into **simple, scalable systems**. Open to connecting with folks in **mobile engineering**, **product**, **consumer/retail tech**, and **AI/cloud infrastructure**.

Cursor for app infrastructure and architecture
In-house AI agent: data analytics, deep learning & reports
Notification infrastructure (FCM + internal server) for multiple apps
